text: Here's what science actually says about inflammation purpose. Inflammation is often seen as a villain, but it’s actually vital for healing. When you get injured, inflammation kicks in to protect and repair damaged tissue. Studies show this process can prevent infections and promote recovery. However, chronic inflammation can lead to serious health issues, hinting at a double-edged sword. Want to learn more about how to manage inflammation? Follow for insights!
